_comment: Minimal dbt manifest fixture (current run) — only the keys cicd_policy_gate/dbt_adapter.py reads. Model SQL is byte-equal to the recorded AcmeCloud fixture cases so the full flow replays offline. Regenerable with real dbt: dbt compile in cicd_policy_gate/dbt_project (any profile targeting acmecloud_demo.public).

model.acmecloud_analytics.customer_arr_b.name: customer_arr_by_region
model.acmecloud_analytics.customer_arr_b.description: Revenue dashboard aggregates ARR by region.
model.acmecloud_analytics.customer_arr_b.raw_code: SELECT region, SUM(arr) FROM customers GROUP BY region
model.acmecloud_analytics.customer_arr_b.compiled_code: SELECT region, SUM(arr) FROM customers GROUP BY region

model.acmecloud_analytics.eu_customer_ar.name: eu_customer_arr_detail
model.acmecloud_analytics.eu_customer_ar.description: Analyst-facing customer detail model includes name and email.
model.acmecloud_analytics.eu_customer_ar.raw_code: SELECT customer_name, email FROM customers WHERE region = 'EU'
model.acmecloud_analytics.eu_customer_ar.compiled_code: SELECT customer_name, email FROM customers WHERE region = 'EU'

model.acmecloud_analytics.active_custome.name: active_customer_activation
model.acmecloud_analytics.active_custome.description: Marketing activation model selects names and email addresses.
model.acmecloud_analytics.active_custome.raw_code: SELECT customer_name, email FROM customers WHERE marketing_consent = 'opted_in'
model.acmecloud_analytics.active_custome.compiled_code: SELECT customer_name, email FROM customers WHERE marketing_consent = 'opted_in'

model.acmecloud_analytics.stg_customers_.name: stg_customers_ephemeral
model.acmecloud_analytics.stg_customers_.description: Ephemeral staging CTE — no queryable relation, the adapter skips it.

exposure.acmecloud_analytics.salesforce_.name: salesforce_customer_sync
exposure.acmecloud_analytics.salesforce_.label: Salesforce customer sync
exposure.acmecloud_analytics.salesforce_.description: CRM sync sends approved customer fields to Salesforce.

metatate.use: sync approved customer fields to the CRM

exposure.acmecloud_analytics.support_ass.name: support_assistant_finetune
exposure.acmecloud_analytics.support_ass.label: Support assistant fine-tune
exposure.acmecloud_analytics.support_ass.description: Fine-tune a support assistant on raw support ticket text.

metatate.use: fine-tune a support assistant on ticket text

exposure.acmecloud_analytics.weekly_kpi_.name: weekly_kpi_email
exposure.acmecloud_analytics.weekly_kpi_.label: Weekly KPI email
exposure.acmecloud_analytics.weekly_kpi_.description: Un-annotated exposure — the adapter reports it as skipped.
